headline: Is any other "affordability" policy coming before the midterms?
summary: Investing.com -- Investors are closely watching Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh’s first FOMC meeting and the outlook for crypto legislation in Congress, according to Wolfe Research.

headline: General Motors (GM) Expands Into Defense, Grid Services And Factory Automation
summary: GM (NYSE:GM) is expanding defense-related collaborations, including discussions to supply munition components to Lockheed Martin. The company is exploring a potential joint venture with Hanwha Defence focused on military vehicle production in Canada. GM has launched a vehicle-to-grid program that lets certain EV owners sell power back to the electricity grid. Collaborative robots are being installed at GM’s Factory Zero alongside a reduction in headcount at the site. For investors tracking...

headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Current Price Attractive?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Lockheed Martin stock still offers good value at around US$510.95, the underlying numbers give you a structured way to test that question instead of relying on headlines or hype. The share price is close to US$510.95 after a period where the stock declined 5.4% over the last week and 2.3% over the past month, while still showing a 2.8% gain year to date and 11.5% over the last year. Those mixed returns sit against a steady drip of news coverage around...
